name: The entryway to the Keep of Atlantis
description:
You are at the entry hall to the huge keep. The high vaulted ceiling is 
carved from solid stone. Huge stone pillars rise up from the floor to meet 
the ceiling far above. The architecture appears to be dwarven. A huge pair 
of gates stand to the west, protecting the keep from the harsh wind outside.
A large hall leads east, deeper into the keep.
